name: Twisty Mushroom
description: A lamp shaped like a mushroom that can be found at Lightkeeper camps.\nUnlike most lamps on the market that use mushrooms as their design inspiration, the part of this lamp that emits light is not the mushroom's "cap," but rather its winding "stem." Even more unusual is the light it emits — half of it warm as sunlight, the other half as cool as the light of the moon.
